id.description: The id of the customer statement model.

created.description: The timestamp of the statement model's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the statement model's last update.

date_start.description: The date from when this statement shows transactions.

date_end.description: The date until which statement shows transactions.

statement_number.description: MT940 Statement number. Unique per monetary account.

regional_format.description: The regional format of a CSV statement.

alias_monetary_account.description: The monetary account for which this statement was created.
